title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Makes redemption meaningful and diffi
content:
✔ Makes redemption meaningful and difficult.
✔ Ensures the classroom narrative reflects their participation.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 7.7

1. Should Combat Scenarios Be Opt-In or Mandatory?

✔ Example: Should every student be required to battle at some point, or should it be only for those who opt in?

2. Should Factions Have the Power to Vote Someone Back from Ghost Status?

✔ Example: Should factions be able to “resurrect” one of their fallen members if they collectively sacrifice XP?

3. Should There Be a Legendary “Betrayal Mechanic” Where a Faction Member Can Defect?

✔ Example: If a player reaches a certain XP threshold, they can betray their faction and switch sides.

🚀 Now ready to execute Version 7.7. Awaiting final input before moving forward. 🎮📖 Are you fully satisfied with this plan?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 454 (chunk 454/555)
